## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss integration pages, blog articles, and content optimization strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/jLmgUsh6AoDFJ1fQL4awzsemsAap65GL?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Integration pages performing well: 1,300 clicks this week, 73,000 impressions (record high)](https://fathom.video/share/jLmgUsh6AoDFJ1fQL4awzsemsAap65GL?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Blog article CTAs being updated; completion expected by Friday EOD](https://fathom.video/share/jLmgUsh6AoDFJ1fQL4awzsemsAap65GL?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Issues with CTA button styling in production environment identified](https://fathom.video/share/jLmgUsh6AoDFJ1fQL4awzsemsAap65GL?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [New AI-driven content creation process to be explored with Strapi's CTO on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/jLmgUsh6AoDFJ1fQL4awzsemsAap65GL?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Recent batch of blog articles needs improvement in comprehensiveness and clarity](https://fathom.video/share/jLmgUsh6AoDFJ1fQL4awzsemsAap65GL?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)

## Topics

### Integration Pages Performance

  - [Record-breaking week: 1,300 clicks, 73,000 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/jLmgUsh6AoDFJ1fQL4awzsemsAap65GL?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Total clicks surpassed 10,000](https://fathom.video/share/jLmgUsh6AoDFJ1fQL4awzsemsAap65GL?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Goal: Reach 2,000 clicks as soon as possible](https://fathom.video/share/jLmgUsh6AoDFJ1fQL4awzsemsAap65GL?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Authentication/Authorization category performing exceptionally well (\>1,000 clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/jLmgUsh6AoDFJ1fQL4awzsemsAap65GL?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
